purpose: Define the n8n workflow nodes for HomeFax Intake Standard v1.

nodes.name: Webhook Intake
nodes.purpose: Receive upload or intake metadata from Zite, Fillout, manual admin upload, or test tools.

nodes.name: Normalize Intake Metadata
nodes.purpose: Normalize property, homeowner, source, report, and tenant metadata.

nodes.name: Ensure Record ID
nodes.purpose: Guarantee one stable record_id is used throughout the workflow.

nodes.name: Call FastAPI Analyze Report
nodes.purpose: Parse PDF, detect adapter, extract findings, and collect image candidates.

nodes.name: Call FastAPI Process Inspection
nodes.purpose: Store extracted findings as verified issues or standard findings.

nodes.name: Call Intake Standard Preview
nodes.purpose: Return the official HomeFax Intake Standard v1 payload.

nodes.name: Extract Payload
nodes.purpose: Extract response.payload and prepare it for validation.

nodes.name: Validate Payload
nodes.purpose: Validate the HomeFax Intake Standard payload.

nodes.name: IF Payload Valid
nodes.purpose: Branch valid payloads to dashboard response and invalid payloads to error response.

nodes.name: Return Validation Errors
nodes.purpose: Return validation errors and stop review-ready processing.

nodes.name: Trigger Async S3 Finalization
nodes.purpose: Finalize S3 image storage without blocking the initial dashboard response.

success_response.next_step: Open dashboard_url to review verified issues. Images may finalize shortly.

failure_response.next_step: Fix payload mapping before sending this inspection into review.
